Name: BetterShopAuctionMedievalUI
Description: Medieval UI override pack for BetterShopAuction. Adds custom parchment-and-gold textures (containers, buttons, separators) and the .ui files referencing them. When installed alongside the main BetterShopAuction plugin, this pack overrides the vanilla game-asset look with a warm medieval brown/gold/parchment theme. Remove this plugin to fall back to vanilla styling. Conflicts with the modern BetterShopAuctionExtensionsUI pack — install only one theme at a time.
